title: Project Life Video
excerpt: For those of you who have been reading this blog for quite some time now might remember that I used to do monthly process videos for Two Peas In a Bucket a while ago. There have been comments and requests…
body:
For those of you who have been reading this blog for quite some time now might remember that I used to do monthly process videos for Two Peas In a Bucket a while ago. There have been comments and requests from some folks asking to see those types of videos again, so I made one. I also confessed something in the video. 

SUPPLIES: Washi Tapes | Washi Tape Dispenser | Fiskars 12-inch paper trimmer | American Crafts adhesive | Epson Wireless Photo Printer | Studio Calico Project Life kit  | Scarlet Lime Planner Society kit
